MemberSignature.Usage: insights.GetAll (foundryFeatures, type, evalId, runId, agentName, includeCoordinates, cancellationToken)

Docs.param: A feature flag opt-in required when using preview operations or modifying persisted preview resources.
Filter by the type of analysis.
Filter by the evaluation ID.
Filter by the evaluation run ID.
Filter by the agent name.
Whether to include coordinates for visualization in the response. Defaults to false.
The cancellation token that can be used to cancel the operation.
Docs.summary: List all insights in reverse chronological order (newest first).
Docs.exception: Service returned a non-success status code.
